role: Contains the complete test suite for the ArchSpine mirror system, including unit, integration, end-to-end, and acceptance tests.
responsibility: Validates the ArchSpine system's correctness, reliability, and architectural integrity through comprehensive testing of CLI commands, configuration, LLM integration, database operations, security, error handling, and core workflows.

children.role: Vitest unit test suite for the ArchSpine repository bootstrap and managed file synchronization system.
